caption: A man wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white shirt, and a red tie speaks into a microphone, with his right arm extended in a gesturing motion. He is positioned in front of a blurred background. In the upper-left corner of the screen, a purple logo reads "clustv". A purple banner across the middle of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS", while a white banner below it reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". At the bottom of the screen, a white bar contains the text "WATCH ON", followed by logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position and pose, though there are slight shifts in his facial expression and the positioning of his hand as he speaks. The on-screen graphics and logos remain static.
